audit_rule.collapse_key: trace class, pre-node44 selected-symbol prefix, promoted suffix, and rooted carrier-prefix endpoint histogram
audit_rule.mixed_edit_scope: substitutions after the fixed x2,x1 tail prefix plus insertions before the promoted x5 suffix, with cost substitution_count + insertion_count and cost searched through three
audit_rule.source_scope: the seven nonstrong target0 rows from the weak-promotion audit
audit_rule.substitution_scope: all fixed-length pre-node44 symbol substitutions, both preserving and not preserving the initial x2,x1 tail prefix, with the promoted x5 suffix fixed
